# n1 · tdd-guide — clearAdvisoryClaim deletes the project-scoped kw:claim marker (#275)

## RED (test-first, before implementation)
New failing assertion:
  Error: clearAdvisoryClaim must list issue comments via gh api (list-called.marker absent)
    at testClearAdvisoryClaimDeletesMarkerComment (scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js)

## GREEN (after implementation)
  testClearAdvisoryClaimDeletesMarkerComment: PASSED
  testClearAdvisoryClaimDoesNotDeleteOtherProjectMarker: PASSED
  testClearAdvisoryClaimOfflineSkipsDelete: PASSED
  Workflow walkthrough simulation passed   (re-run independently by orchestrator from the worktree)

## Change
clearAdvisoryClaim(issueNumber, reason, project): added `project` param. After removing the label and
posting the human "cleared" comment, it lists repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues/<n>/comments via ghExec,
matches comments whose body contains the THIS-project marker `<!-- kw:claim project=<project> -->`,
and deletes each via `gh api --method DELETE repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues/comments/<id>` (correct
repo-level endpoint). Project-scoped so another live session/project's marker is NOT deleted (still
blocks). OFFLINE short-circuit unchanged (returns skipped_offline before any gh call). New block
wrapped in try/catch — a network failure cannot crash finalize/discard. All four call sites
(cmdFinalize→args.project, discard→folder.project, pr-merged→folder.project, pr-closed→folder.project)
thread the project.

## Write set (exactly the 3 declared files)
- scripts/kaola-workflow-claim.js
- plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-claim.js  (byte-identical: `diff` prints nothing — CONFIRMED)
- scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js  (3 new tests + registered in run sequence)
